headline: JPMorgan Maintains Neutral Rating on Church & Dwight (CHD)
summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) is one of the 11 Best Consumer Staples Stocks to Invest In. On April 17, 2026, JPMorgan lowered its price target on Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) to $98 from $100 and maintained a Neutral rating as part of a broader preview for the household and personal care sector […]
